Data Processing Addendum (Indonesia) between PT Cakrawala Dana Nusatech Tbk (Pengendali Data; listed on a bursa efek di Indonesia) and PT Samudra Quanta Investama (Prosesor) for HR, fintech, and board-memo workflows.
PII scope under UU No.27/2022 tentang Perlindungan Data Pribadi: any data identifying or making a person identifiable alone or when combined (including contact, device, employment, and account references).
MNPI under Capital Markets Law and OJK disclosure rules: material non-public information about the Issuer that would reasonably affect investor decisions or the price of its securities.
Example operational record: Bapak Adi Prakoso (Head of Risk), born 22-07-1985, PT Cakrawala Dana Nusatech Tbk, kantor Menara Seruni, Jl. Kijang Fiktif No.8, Jakarta Selatan, Kode Pos 12XXX; employee code EP-0473; internal alias r_prks.
Device/session cluster for the same matter: Android Garuda X5 device, ser GA X5  2 3 7 9 (OCR scan), app acct fin-app/u/adi.p, payroll acc 7001-11**-923 (masked), https://portal.nusatech-fict.co.id/memo/board?doc=aq-2026&sess=U-07-2 33&sig=adp%2F8b%3D; contact: adi.prakoso@nusatech-fict.co.id.
Board memo content (treated as MNPI until OJK/bursa public disclosure): proposed acquisition of PT Aurora Poin Digital, expected signing 15-08-2026, contingent pricing collar; MNPI must not be emailed externally.
Processing purposes: employment administration, compliance, and restricted MNPI circulation; lawful basis: pelaksanaan perjanjian kerja and pemenuhan kewajiban hukum; retention: HR files 7 years, MNPI drafts until disclosure + 2 years.
Storage and transfer: primary DC Cikarang (ID), encrypted backup SG-1 (Singapore) with kontrak pengikat antar pihak, vendor PT Mega Surya AwanNusa; cross-border transfer follows UU PDP and internal DPIA record DP-2026-04.
Data subject rights: akses, perbaikan, penghapusan; submit DSAR to dpo@nusatech-fict.co.id or https://privacy.nusatech-fict.co.id/dsar; acknowledgment in 3 hari kerja and substantive response within 14 hari kerja.
Security: audit logs retain IP, time, and user handle r_prks; K T P copy is not stored, only salted hash sha256: 0aa9f1c-…; encryption-at-rest AES-256; role-based access via OJK-compliant controls.
We do not collect device MAC addresses, precise GPS, or raw NIK scans from public app visitors; generic site analytics are aggregated and anonymised.
Generic policy text and public-source references: release notes for merpati-pay v3.1, faq pages, and sprint backlog are non-personal and not MNPI; do not treat newsroom clippings as confidential.
Unlinked operational metrics (should not identify a person alone): age 29, domisili Jakarta Barat, iOS 16.5, merchant id m-08xx, workstation Lantai 12—used only for capacity planning.
Another detached fragment: imei 35-209***-** and sess ts=08:14:55Z recorded by a test phone in Bandung; no name, no employer, no linkage to any registered user.
Incident notice workflow: potential breach reported to OJK and the relevant bursa and impacted individuals within statutory timelines; drafts bear the label MNPI//INTERNAL and are not for submission until cleared by Sekretaris Perusahaan.
